title: CriticalWarn
description: Displays a low health warning above the HUD
body:
❤️CriticalWarn
 
**Have you ever been in the middle of an intense battle and didn’t notice that your health was almost gone? This simple mod shows a clear message above the HUD when your HP gets low, helping you react before it’s too late.**

🛠️ Technical Info
- Client-side.
- Dependencies: Fabric API.
